DEFENDANTS MICHELLE TORRES AND VICTORIA TORRES' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS'S ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION; REQUEST FOR REASONABLE SANCTIONS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF CARMELA ABALON IS ORDERED TO APPEAR ON JANUARY 9, 2014 AT 10:00 AM OR AN ALTERNATIVE DATE AGREED UPON BETWEEN COUNSEL TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AT STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, 505 14TH STREET, SUITE 400, OAKLAND, CA 94612, (510) 457-3440. PLAINTIFF CARMELA ABALON IS ORDERED TO PAY COURT REPORTER COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $164.50, THE FILING FEE OF $60.00 AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 WITHIN 20 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON THIS MOTION. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS ORDER MAY SUBJECT PLAINTIFF TO TERMINATING SANCTIONS UPON APPLICATION BY DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminatinf, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $735.00 As Against Pltf And Pltf'S Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MICHELLE TORRES AND VICTORIA TORRES's Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $735.00 As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff's Counsel Of Record IS Off calendar per request of moving party. Judge: Anthony Schoenberg; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Ntc Of And Mtn To Compel 1) Written Discovery Verifications 2) To Have Req.'S For Admissions Deemed Admitted; Req. For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorney'S
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sabrina M. Berdux, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 510.457.3444, for defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendants' counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. Defendants Michael Torres and Visstoria Torres' Motion To Compel The Filing Of A Written Verification To Plaintiff Carmela Abalon's Discovery Requests And To Have Her Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to file the written verification within ten (10) days of this order; failure to provide written verification to the requests for admission within that ten day period will result in the matters being deemed admitted and plaintiff will be precluded from introducing evidence seeking to contradict such admissions. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $500.00 will be assessed against plaintiff payment of which should be made within ten (10) days of this order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marrianne Sioson, Esq., 415.398.5000, for moving party; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Brian Larson, Esq.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD of PLAINTIFF CARMELA ABALON is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Pltff'S Attendance At Deposition; Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SABRINA BERDUX, ESQ., 410.457.3444, FOR DEFENDANTS MICHELEL TORRES AND VICTORIA TORRES; NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING: THE JUDGE PRO TEM ADOPTS HIS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS MICHELLE TORRES AND VICTORIA TORRES' MOTION To Compel PLAINTIFFS'S Attendance At Deposition; Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys' Fees IS GRANTED. Plaintiff Carmela Abalon is ORDERED to appear on January 9, 2014 at 10:00 am or an alternative date agreed upon between counsel to appear for deposition at STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, 505 14th Street, Suite 400, Oakland, CA 94612, (510) 457-3440. Plaintiff Carmela Abalon is ORDERED to pay court reporter costs in the amount of $164.50, the filing fee of $60.00 and attorney's fees in the amount of $250.00 within 20 days of notice of entry of order on this motion. Failure to comply with this order may subject plaintiff to terminating sanctions upon application by Defendants.
ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
